concerns.text: Plan.md lists quickstart.md, data-model.md, and contracts/ as Phase 1 outputs, but tasks.md has no implementation tasks to create these artifacts. Missing: T-quickstart, T-data-model, T-contracts.
Constitution Principle II requires Reference-Validator Agent for citation validation (≥0.7 title overlap), but no task implements this validation component. Missing: T-reference-validator.
Constitution Principle III requires PII scan enforcement in workflow, but no task exists to run PII scanning. T029 configures CI but does not include PII scan step.
Constitution Principle V requires content hashes for every artifact. T031 updates state YAML but does not explicitly generate content hashes. Missing: T-hash-generation.
T025 references 'Plan Kickback' in description but FR-007 in spec.md still mandates FP/FN rates. Tag references outdated plan state; should be updated to reflect spec-plan sync status.
